title: Frost Giant
content: Massive humanoid made of ice and snow, wielding frozen weapons. Can freeze enemies and summon blizzards. Found in Frosthold. Cannot be tamed. Difficulty: High.

title: Ice Elemental
content: Pure cold energy given form. Deals cold damage and slows attackers. Found in Frosthold. Cannot be tamed. Difficulty: Medium.

title: White Dragon
content: Ancient dragon of the frozen wastes. Breathes ice and guards frozen treasures. Found in Frosthold. Cannot be tamed. Difficulty: Boss.

title: Winter Wolf
content: Large wolf with frost-white fur. Pack hunter with ice breath. Found in Frosthold. Can be tamed by skilled animal trainers. Difficulty: Medium.

title: Glacial Stalker
content: Invisible predator made of living ice. Ambushes prey in frozen terrain. Found in Frosthold. Cannot be tamed. Difficulty: Medium.

title: Boreal Serpent
content: Massive ice snake that burrows through glaciers. Found in Frosthold. Cannot be tamed. Difficulty: High.

title: Ice Troll
content: Regenerating troll adapted to frozen environments. Found in Frosthold. Cannot be tamed. Difficulty: Medium.

title: Frost Wraith
content: Undead spirit of those who froze to death. Drains warmth. Found in Frosthold. Cannot be tamed. Difficulty: Medium.

title: Fire Elemental
content: Living flame that burns everything it touches. Immune to fire. Found in Emberlands. Cannot be tamed. Difficulty: Medium.

title: Lava Golem
content: Construct made of cooled lava and obsidian. Extremely tough. Found in Emberlands. Cannot be tamed. Difficulty: High.

title: Phoenix
content: Mythical fire bird that resurrects from its ashes. Burns with eternal flame. Found in Emberlands. Cannot be tamed. Difficulty: Boss.

title: Salamander
content: Fire-breathing lizard that lives in lava. Highly dangerous. Found in Emberlands. Cannot be tamed. Difficulty: Medium.

title: Cinder Drake
content: Young dragon adapted to volcanic environments. Found in Emberlands. Cannot be tamed. Difficulty: Medium.

title: Magma Crawler
content: Insect-like creature that swims through molten rock. Found in Emberlands. Cannot be tamed. Difficulty: Low.

title: Treant
content: Ancient walking tree that guards the forest. Incredibly strong and wise. Found in Verdantpeak. Cannot be tamed. Difficulty: High.

title: Dryad
content: Beautiful tree spirit bound to sacred groves. Can control plants. Found in Verdantpeak. Cannot be tamed. Difficulty: Medium.

title: Dire Wolf
content: Massive wolf pack hunter. Loyal companion when tamed. Found in Verdantpeak. Can be tamed by skilled animal trainers. Difficulty: Medium.

title: Giant Spider
content: Web-spinning predator of the deep forest. Venomous bite. Found in Verdantpeak. Cannot be tamed. Difficulty: Medium.

title: Sprite
content: Tiny fey creature with nature magic. Playful but powerful. Found in Verdantpeak. Cannot be tamed. Difficulty: Low.

title: Owlbear
content: Magical hybrid of owl and bear. Fierce territorial guardian. Found in Verdantpeak. Cannot be tamed. Difficulty: High.

title: Green Dragon
content: Forest dragon with poison breath. Cunning and deceptive. Found in Verdantpeak. Cannot be tamed. Difficulty: Boss.

title: Unicorn
content: Pure white horse with healing magic. Only approaches the pure-hearted. Found in Verdantpeak. Can be tamed by skilled animal trainers. Difficulty: Medium.

title: Sand Elemental
content: Whirling vortex of sand that can blind and suffocate. Found in Whispering Sands. Cannot be tamed. Difficulty: Medium.

title: Mummy
content: Undead guardian of ancient tombs. Curse of disease. Found in Whispering Sands. Cannot be tamed. Difficulty: Medium.

title: Giant Scorpion
content: Massive desert scorpion with deadly venom. Found in Whispering Sands. Cannot be tamed. Difficulty: High.

title: Sand Dragon
content: Dragon that burrows through sand. Lightning breath. Found in Whispering Sands. Cannot be tamed. Difficulty: Boss.

title: Sphinx
content: Intelligent creature with riddles and ancient knowledge. Found in Whispering Sands. Cannot be tamed. Difficulty: High.

title: Harpy
content: Bird-woman hybrid that snatches prey from above. Found in Whispering Sands. Cannot be tamed. Difficulty: Medium.

title: Ankheg
content: Giant insect that burrows beneath the desert. Found in Whispering Sands. Cannot be tamed. Difficulty: Medium.

title: Bog Hag
content: Corrupted witch of the swamp. Brews deadly potions. Found in Shadowfen. Cannot be tamed. Difficulty: High.

title: Swamp Thing
content: Animated mass of vegetation and decay. Found in Shadowfen. Cannot be tamed. Difficulty: Medium.

title: Poison Drake
content: Dragon adapted to toxic environments. Venom breath. Found in Shadowfen. Cannot be tamed. Difficulty: High.

title: Will-o'-Wisp
content: Ghostly light that lures travelers into danger. Found in Shadowfen. Cannot be tamed. Difficulty: Low.

title: Giant Frog
content: Massive amphibian that swallows prey whole. Found in Shadowfen. Cannot be tamed. Difficulty: Medium.

title: Iron Golem
content: Clockwork construct programmed to guard. Nearly indestructible. Found in Ironclad Empire. Cannot be tamed. Difficulty: High.

title: Automaton
content: Steam-powered mechanical soldier. Follows orders precisely. Found in Ironclad Empire. Cannot be tamed. Difficulty: Medium.

title: Clockwork Beast
content: Mechanical predator with gears and springs. Found in Ironclad Empire. Cannot be tamed. Difficulty: Medium.

title: Steam Mephit
content: Imp-like creature made of steam and heat. Found in Ironclad Empire. Cannot be tamed. Difficulty: Low.

title: Wyvern
content: Two-legged dragon used as aerial mount. Found in Ironclad Empire. Can be tamed by skilled animal trainers. Difficulty: High.

title: Griffon
content: Half eagle, half lion. Noble aerial guardian. Found in Ironclad Empire. Can be tamed by skilled animal trainers. Difficulty: High.

title: Shadow Beast
content: Living shadow that hunts in darkness. Found in ShadowVoid. Cannot be tamed. Difficulty: Medium.

title: Void Horror
content: Creature from beyond reality. Sanity-destroying. Found in ShadowVoid. Cannot be tamed. Difficulty: Boss.

title: Wraith
content: Incorporeal undead that drains life force. Found in ShadowVoid. Cannot be tamed. Difficulty: High.

title: Nightmare
content: Fiery horse from the shadow plane. Burns with dark flames. Found in ShadowVoid. Can be tamed by skilled animal trainers. Difficulty: High.

title: Crystal Elemental
content: Living crystal that refracts light into lasers. Found in Crystal Barrens. Cannot be tamed. Difficulty: Medium.

title: Prism Dragon
content: Dragon made of crystal with rainbow breath. Found in Crystal Barrens. Cannot be tamed. Difficulty: Boss.

title: Kraken
content: Legendary sea monster with massive tentacles. Found in Underwater. Cannot be tamed. Difficulty: Boss.

title: Sea Serpent
content: Giant ocean snake that attacks ships. Found in Underwater. Cannot be tamed. Difficulty: High.

title: Merrow
content: Evil merman warrior with trident. Found in Underwater. Cannot be tamed. Difficulty: Medium.

title: Giant Crab
content: Massive crustacean with crushing claws. Found in Underwater. Cannot be tamed. Difficulty: Medium.

title: Air Elemental
content: Living wind that throws enemies with gales. Found in Skyreach. Cannot be tamed. Difficulty: Medium.

title: Storm Eagle
content: Massive bird that calls lightning. Found in Skyreach. Can be tamed by skilled animal trainers. Difficulty: High.

title: Cloud Giant
content: Giant that lives on sky islands. Found in Skyreach. Cannot be tamed. Difficulty: High.

title: Frosthold Bestiary
content: The frozen wastes of Frosthold are home to ice-adapted creatures including Frost Giants, Ice Elementals, White Dragons, Winter Wolves, and Glacial Stalkers. Most creatures here deal cold damage and can freeze or slow their prey. The harsh environment produces incredibly tough monsters.

title: Verdantpeak Bestiary
content: The ancient forests of Verdantpeak shelter Treants, Dryads, Dire Wolves, Giant Spiders, Owlbears, and Green Dragons. Many creatures here can control plants or use nature magic. The forest is protected by ancient guardians who attack those who harm the trees.

title: Emberlands Bestiary
content: The volcanic Emberlands are inhabited by Fire Elementals, Lava Golems, Phoenixes, Salamanders, and Cinder Drakes. All creatures here are immune to fire and many deal fire damage. The extreme heat makes this one of the most dangerous regions.
